description: Type demo@timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraDemo123! into the password field
Wait for 3 seconds for the dashboard and weekly calendar to load
Click on a white empty cell in the weekly calendar time grid at 10:00 on a weekday column
Wait for 2 seconds for the event dialog to open
Type TestSprite Calendar Steps Cleanup into the title input field labeled Judul Event in the event dialog
Click the 'Simpan Event' button in the event dialog
Wait for 3 seconds for the event to save
Verify the weekly calendar grid shows an event block containing TestSprite Calendar Steps Cleanup
Open TestSprite Calendar Steps Cleanup, click Hapus, and confirm the browser deletion prompt
